creator: rometravelers
caption:
The name is Mama. Just Mama. 🍸

72 hours. One baby. One very beautiful stay at @hoteldelavillerome @roccofortehotels. No sidekick, no backup, no one to hold the nappy bag except me.

Turns out you don’t need a tuxedo or a sports car to feel like a spy. You just need a great hotel, a baby who naps on cue, and the audacity to travel solo with a one year old.

Mission? Absolutely accomplished. 🇮🇹✨
